briefdescription.para: This function disables DP-side audio SDP/timestamp streams.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the HPD hot plug (connect) callback.

detaileddescription.para: It reads sink capabilities, runs link training, and sets up the video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the RunConfig structure.

briefdescription.para: This function is the HPD hot unplug (disconnect) callback.

detaileddescription.para: It disables the video stream and logs the disconnect event.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the RunConfig structure.

briefdescription.para: This function is the HPD IRQ (short pulse / sink request) callback.

detaileddescription.para: It reads the DPCD Device Service IRQ Vector and Link Service IRQ Vector to determine the cause of the interrupt and takes appropriate action.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the RunConfig structure.

briefdescription.para: This function registers HPD callbacks and connects the DP interrupt to the GIC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: This file contains HPD interrupt callbacks and DP interrupt setup for the DPDC non-live application.
